economic_notes: Nation has significant economic development activities including NWF Resources LP macro pipeline agreement ($9.5M), Horizon/Falcon camp services ($1.75M), Lhai Ventures LP, Endako Tsey LP, gas bar (Tse Yaz Bunket), and Nadleh Store. Coastal Gaslink pipeline revenues. Four Rivers Co-operative membership.
notes: Nation consolidated Tse Yaz Bunket Gas Bar Ltd. (formerly Chundo Yus Forestry General Partner Ltd.) in current year after reclassifying from GBE to controlled entity - this is a change from prior year. 14 government business enterprises/partnerships accounted for under modified equity method. Large NWF Resources LP accounts receivable of $4.1M outstanding. Term deposits of $20M purchased in current year maturing June 2024 at 5.6%. Ottawa Trust Fund balance $2.08M held in Government of Canada Consolidated Revenue Fund. Prior year ISC funding in segmented disclosure shows $4,440,983 vs $3,940,983 on face of statements - minor discrepancy. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($5,896,157) + Province of BC ($4,555,930) + First Nations Health Authority ($808,690) = $11,260,777. Community Services segment includes health programs. expenses_enterprises represents Economic Development segment.
